name: Mixed Material Entryway Organizer Matte White - Brightroom™: Wall Mounted, Steel & Rubberwood, 4 Hooks, 30lb Capacity
description:
Keep your entryway looking organized with a touch of mixed-material style with the Mixed Material Entryway Organizer from Brightroom™. Featuring a shelf-like design, this entryway organizer comes with hooks at the bottom for a perfect blend of functionality and style. The light-tone wood shelf complements the white metal frame for an appealing look that suits a variety of aesthetics. Simply display your decorative items and plants on the shelf and organize your bags and other items on the hooks.

Brightroom™: See your space in a new light.
